description: Curated install profiles (role/stack spines) for the Polymath marketplace. Solves discovery-before-install: a user picks ONE profile instead of choosing from the full plugin catalog, then installs more a-la-carte on top. Every profile is a starting set, not a lock. Plugin names are validated against .claude-plugin/marketplace.json by tools/check-registry.py profiles (PROFILE-1).
_note: Every profile implicitly includes the _spine (core = routing/conventions/project-context; flows = workflow runner). check-registry.py profiles treats the spine as always present.

backend.title: Backend engineer
backend.for: API/service developers shipping changes against a server + database.

frontend.title: Frontend / web engineer
frontend.for: UI developers who care about components, Web Vitals, bundles, a11y, and i18n.

sre.title: SRE / on-call
sre.for: Reliability and incident response — SLOs, observability, live incidents, postmortems.

platform.title: Platform / DevOps engineer
platform.for: Golden paths, CI/CD, containers, cloud and Kubernetes infra.

pm.title: Product manager
pm.for: Discovery through delivery — PRDs, prioritization, roadmaps, research, comms.

staff.title: Staff+ / tech lead
staff.for: Thinking, architecture, decisions, planning, and review across the SDLC.

author.title: Polymath plugin author
author.for: Building and validating new Polymath plugins, skills, and connectors.

_budget_note: alwaysOnBudget: per-profile ceiling (tokens) on the summed always-on listing cost of the profile's plugins plus the _spine, gated by tools/token-report.py profiles (PROFILE-2). Ratchet: lower it when descriptions shrink; raising it is a reviewed decision.
